title: MPLADS Overview
details: Members of Parliament Local Area Development Scheme. Each MP has the choice to suggest to the District Collector for works to the tune of ₹5 Crores per annum to be taken up in his/her constituency.
importance: Crucial for politicians to fund local development projects like drinking water, primary education, public health, and roads.

title: Eligible Works
details: Construction of school buildings, labs, libraries, hospitals, community centers, and installation of solar lights.
importance: Helps politicians address specific infrastructure gaps identified by their constituents.
